response.justification: The candidate has extensive software engineering experience, primarily in full-stack web development and platform engineering, but completely lacks the specialized hardware-software co-design, SoC and IP modeling, and AI accelerator performance optimization skills required for this Principal Performance Architect position.
strengths: Over 10 years of software development experience across multiple languages including TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and C/C++.
Strong background in system architecture for scalable web services and data integration platforms.
Demonstrated leadership and initiative through founding open-source platforms and organizing technical workshops.
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware-software co-design.
Lacks any background in deep neural network training, inference optimization, or AI hardware accelerators.
No experience with SIMD/MIMD, GPU architecture, or hardware-level performance bottleneck analysis.
